Describe the specific hand movements observed from the man in the dark blue t-shirt.
canonical_answer: At 4 seconds, the man raises both hands to chest level with index fingers extended; at 6 seconds, he checks the time on his black wristwatch while speaking; at 10 seconds, he stands with hands clasped together in front of the glass sliding doors.

question: Outline the sequence of activities performed by the blond man during the video.
canonical_answer: At 4 seconds, a person wearing a dark blue t-shirt points fingers upward; at 6 seconds, the individual looks down at their left wrist to view the watch; at 10 seconds, the man stands still with hands clasped near the wooden desk and sofa.
